title: Little Trees Air Freshener, New Car Fragrance
features: An air freshener that you can hang just about anywhere
Give your vehicle a fragrance tune-up with this rich scent of a brand new car
Just one of 30+ fragrances for car and home
A world-famous brand for over 60 years
description: Product Description Has your car interior lost its ‘new’ smell? Do you have a room or two that could do with a fresh fragrance? Are you a dog lover who isn’t always in love with pet odour’? For over 60 years now, the iconic LITTLE TREES range of air fresheners has helped the world with such problems. What was once thought of as a car-only product, is now seen in homes, bathrooms, kitchens, caravans, offices, boats, reception areas, toilets and more. ‘CLIP’ AIR FRESHENERS from LITTLE TREES have a contemporary and stylish design. There is a choice of 10 fragrances – Clean Laundry, Forest Fruit, New Car, Tribal, Tropical, Sport, Ocean Paradise, Vanilla, Black Ice and Bubble Gum – so you are bound to find one or more that suit your tastes. It looks very cool, unique, not like an air freshener at all and starts to work immediately. Box Contains 1 x Magic Tree New Car Scent Air Freshener Manufacturer Contact Information Little Trees Air Freshener New Car Scent See more
